description_long: This object is a compact, military-style shotgun with a dark, weathered metal finish and a utilitarian design. The main body is cylindrical and robust, with a prominent barrel extending from the front and a folding wire stock at the rear. The grip is angled and ergonomic, made from a similar dark material, and the trigger is housed within a rounded guard. A vertical magazine protrudes from beneath the receiver, suggesting a high-capacity, rapid-fire capability. The overall construction is rugged, with visible wear and patina, indicating extensive use or age. The shotgun's design is streamlined for portability and quick deployment, suitable for close-quarters urban environments.
description: A compact, military-style shotgun with a dark, weathered metal body, folding wire stock, and vertical magazine. Its rugged, utilitarian design is ideal for rapid use in urban settings.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the shotgun, including the folding wire stock, vertical magazine, and ergonomic grip.
description_view_1: Top-down view highlighting the cylindrical receiver, the alignment of the barrel, and the open loop of the wire stock.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the same key features as view 0, with the folding stock and magazine clearly visible.
description_view_3: Bottom-up view focusing on the underside of the receiver, the magazine, and the trigger guard area.
attribute_barrel_configuration: single-barrel, no visible ribbing or venting, medium length
attribute_trigger_guard_design: rounded, medium-sized trigger guard with smooth edges and no visible reinforcement
